SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
DelegationBasedRuleApplicationManager<Goal>, NewRuleListener, RuleApplicationManager<Goal>
public class FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager extends Object implements DelegationBasedRuleApplicationManager<Goal>
A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal). The real work is delegated to a second manager (delegate pattern), this class only filters rule applications
